name: Fat Ender Dragon (Jane)
description:
It's that one ender dragon from minecraft, but fat and really hungry. Meant for growth and feeding, but do whatever you want. First bot ever, so feel free to let me know what to change, leave reviews, the usual. Obviously nsfw and furry, so be careful.
